title: Senior Revenue Manager at MakeMyTrip Hotels

jsonLd.title: Senior Revenue Manager at MakeMyTrip Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Revenue Manager with drive and ambition, MakeMyTrip Hotels in Jabalpur is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About MakeMyTrip Hotels:
MakeMyTrip Hotels is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Develop and maintain relationships with corporate clients
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Monitor F&B service quality and maintain hygiene standards
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Opera PMS
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in MICE
• Proficiency in Housekeeping Standards
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Sommelier Skills

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with MakeMyTrip Hotels!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
